description: A minimal Uno Platform app for validating the sample loading flow.

messages.content: Create a simple Hello World app

Here's your Hello World app! It displays a greeting message with a counter button.

The app is built and running in the preview.

suggestedPrompts: Change the greeting text to something fun
Add a second page with navigation
Style it with Material Design colors

messages.content: Create a simple Hello World Uno Platform app.

I've created a minimal Uno Platform app at TestApp/TestApp.csproj.

**Structure:**
- App.xaml / App.xaml.cs — Application root
- MainPage.xaml / MainPage.xaml.cs — Single page with greeting text and counter button
- Platforms/Desktop/Program.cs — Desktop entry point

The app is built and running. The user may ask me to modify it.
